title: PrivateYT's Sun & Moon
description: Changes the sun and moon texture
body:
## **Ever felt the normal sun and moon in Minecraft was boring?**
Well, this resource pack is for you. This resource pack gives the sun a pair of sunglasses, and the moon a pair of eyes to make your world more interesting.
### Sunset:
![Sunset ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddb7b4dfc2a4ec5240fca0edda6972be60747283.png)
### Nighttime:
![New moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20ef836a4ae25bfeabb9f46d4213998b194739a6_0.webp)
This resource pack works with shaders, too!
